zh.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie是John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail的女兒，於1509年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾。她於大約1525年與MacKay of Reay結婚。她去世於1618年在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可加賀享年109歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie was born in 1509, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland as the daughter of John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail. She married MacKay of Reay about 1525. She died in 1618, in Coigach, Cromartyshire, Scotland, at the age of 109, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie est née en 1509, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, fille de John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail. Elle a épousé MacKay of Reay environ 1525. Elle est décédée en 1618, à Coigach, Cromartyshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 109 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie wurde 1509 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, als Tochter von John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail geboren. Sie hat um 1525 MacKay of Reay geheiratet. Sie starb 1618 im Alter von 109 Jahren in Coigach, Cromartyshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie è nata il nel 1509 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland come figlia di John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail. Lei sposato MacKay of Reay circa 1525. Morì nel 1618, nel Coigach, Cromartyshire, Scotland, all'età di 109 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzieは1509年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでJohn - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintailの娘として生まれた。約1525年にMacKay of Reayと結婚した。彼女は1618年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアコイガチで109歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie(은)는 1509년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1525년 MacKay of Reay(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1618년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 코익악h에서 109세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie nasceu em 1509, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland filha de John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail. Ela casou-se com MacKay of Reay aproximadamente 1525. Ela faleceu em 1618, em Coigach, Cromartyshire, Scotland, com 109 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Mackenzie родилась в 1509 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. Её отца звали John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени MacKay of Reay около 1525 г. Она умерла в 1618 г. в местности коигач, кромертишир, Шотландия в возрасте 109 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
